/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/dsp_tests.dir/dsp_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dsp_tests.dir/dsp_helpers.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dsp_tests.dir/compressor_math_test.cpp.o -o dsp_tests  _deps/catch2-build/src/libCatch2Main.a _deps/catch2-build/src/libCatch2.a
